description: When false, the skill is hidden from user-facing menus (e.g., the / command menu). The AI can still invoke it. Default: true.

amp.mechanism: not documented — no mechanism to hide skills from user-facing menus is described; skills are managed via 'amp skill' CLI and command palette, not a slash-command invocation menu

claude-code.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: user-invocable (optional bool, default true)

copilot-cli.mechanism: slash-prefixed skill name in user prompt (e.g. /frontend-design)

factory-droid.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: user-invocable (optional bool, default: true)

roo-code.mechanism: No user-invocation flag observed — skills are auto-loaded based on description matching

windsurf.mechanism: Explicit @mention by skill name in Cascade input (e.g., @deploy-to-production). Always available regardless of auto-invocation eligibility.
